---
title: "Research"
---

::: {.research-hero-overlay .mid-page-start}
::: {.home-bubble-minimal}

::: {.circle-grid .single-row}

::: {.circle-card}
[Causal Inference](research/causal-inference.qmd)
:::

::: {.circle-card}
[Multiple Rater](research/multiple-rater.qmd)
:::


::: {.circle-card}
[Panel Data](research/panel-data.qmd)
:::

::: {.circle-card}
[Political Economy](research/political-economy.qmd)
:::

::: {.circle-card}
[Political Methodology](research/political-methodology.qmd)
:::

:::
:::
:::
